author: prompt_manager_bootstrap
description: VLM fallback recovery of a chapter's title when its opening page is set (in whole or in part) in a legacy non-Unicode font and both the raw text layer and plain Tesseract OCR fail. Replaces a previous file at this path that mistakenly contained the recover_book_cover_metadata prompt (asked for book_title/klass instead of chapter_title, and referenced ocr_title_hint instead of the candidate_titles/ocr_text_first_pages variables this task actually supplies), which made the output_contract's required chapter_title field impossible to satisfy.
